data.description: STELLANTIS: JEEP Q1 TOTAL SALES UP 3% VS Q1 2025; FCA US Q1 SALES RISE 4% YOY

data.title: Babel Street Extends Free Real-Time Risk Intelligence to U.S. Tech Companies Operating Across the Middle East Being Targeted by Iran’s Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps
data.description: In a recent announcement, Babel Street, a leading provider of mission-grade risk intelligence, revealed its initiative to provide customized threat intelligence briefings to security leaders in the technology industry for free. This offer is extended to companies identified by Iran’s Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps in a warning issued on March 31. The IRGC indicated intentions to target 18 prominent U.S. technology companies, raising significant geopolitical risk concerns for the private sector.
What's Going On With ConocoPhillips Stock Wednesday?

data.title: Changes in Apollo Group OÜ's supervisory board have been reported.
data.description: A recent report reveals that the global economy is projected to grow by 4.9% in 2021, with China leading the way with a growth rate of 8.4%. The United States is expected to see a growth of 6.4%, while the Eurozone is forecasted to grow by 4.3%. These numbers indicate a significant rebound from the economic downturn caused by the COVID-19 pandemic in 2020. Additionally, global trade is expected to increase by 8.4% this year. The recovery in the global economy is attributed to the ongoing vaccination efforts and the stimulus packages implemented by various governments to revive economic activity.

data.title: CAMERON BAWDEN'S "HOME SERVICE EMPIRE" HITS #1 BESTSELLER ON AMAZON SERVICE INDUSTRY LIST ONE DAY AFTER LAUNCH
data.description: On April 1, 2026, in Phoenix, Cameron Bawden, an entrepreneur, investor, and founder of Hype Pharm, achieved the top spot on Amazon's Service Industry list with his latest book titled "Home Service Empire: How I Built, Scaled, and Sold a Family of Businesses Worth Over..." within a short period of release. This accomplishment signifies the book's popularity and success among readers.

data.title: Publix recognized on Fortune’s Best Companies to Work For list
data.description: Publix, headquartered in Lakeland, Florida, has once again secured a spot on Fortune's prestigious 100 Best Companies to Work For list for the 29th consecutive year, coming in at No. 50. This places Publix among an elite group of only four companies that have earned a position on the list every year since its inception in 1998. CEO Kevin Murphy expressed gratitude to their workforce of 260,000 employees, emphasizing their pivotal role in upholding Publix's values and contributing to its ongoing prosperity. Murphy attributed the company's success to its dedicated staff, highlighting their commitment to maintaining Publix as a highly sought-after employer.
EXPLOSIONS REPORTED IN DUBAI

data.title: DivCore Capital & ICONIQ Launch Sentral Strategic Partners as New Residential Platform
data.description: A new residential investment platform named Sentral Strategic Partners has been introduced by DivCore Capital in collaboration with ICONIQ and Sentral. This platform aims to invest in Class A multifamily acquisitions and development in various key U.S. markets. The focus of the platform is on innovation and enhancing resident experience. By combining DivCore's real estate investment management expertise in major markets nationwide with ICONIQ's innovative strategies, the platform seeks to excel in this sector.

data.title: Naoris debuts post-quantum blockchain for enhanced security amid rising quantum threats. #PostQuantum #Blockchain
data.description: A newly launched Naoris Protocol has introduced a layer-1 blockchain that aims to safeguard transactions from potential cryptographic risks in the post-quantum era. This blockchain platform utilizes advanced technology to enhance security and prevent vulnerabilities that may arise in the future.

data.title: CFTC chair ready to regulate entire crypto market, giving first 100-days report since US Senate confirmation in December.
data.description: Michael Selig provided an overview of his initial 100 days leading the commodities regulator after being officially appointed by the US Senate in December.

data.title: Full Sail University Returns for 23rd Year as Primary Sponsor of the Florida Film Festival
data.description: Winter Park, Florida will host the 35th Florida Film Festival from April 10 to 19, 2026. Full Sail University, for the 23rd consecutive year, will be the primary sponsor of the event.

data.title: Anfield Energy Further Amends Credit Facility with Extract
data.description: Anfield Energy Inc. of Vancouver, British Columbia, has announced a revised agreement with Extract Advisors LLC regarding their existing credit facility. This amendment follows an earlier news release on January 29, 2026. The Credit Facility, initially disclosed on October 6, 2023, April 17, 2024, and March 18, 2025, is being adjusted as part of an amending and consent agreement. Extract, acting as agent for the Credit Facility, has given consent for Anfield’s proposed acquisition of all shares of B.R.S. Inc., as detailed in a news release from December 18, 2025. Anfield is listed on the TSX.V as AEC, NASDAQ as AEC, and Frankfurt as 0AD.

data.title: GAMCO Expects to Report Diluted EPS for the First Quarter 2026 of $0.62 to $0.68 Per Share
data.description: In Palm Beach, Florida, on April 01, 2026, GAMCO Investors, Inc. (also known as Gabelli) shared that their assets under management (AUM) stood at $35.3 billion as of March 31, 2026, witnessing growth from $31.2 billion recorded on March 31, 2025.

data.title: DISNEY AND NATIONAL GEOGRAPHIC INVITE AUDIENCES TO 'STEP INTO WONDER' THIS EARTH MONTH TO CELEBRATE AND EXPLORE THE WORLD AROUND THEM
data.description: In celebration of the Disney Conservation Fund's 30th anniversary, a month-long campaign has been launched in collaboration with National Geographic. This initiative aims to inspire families and individuals to explore and appreciate the marvels of the natural world through captivating narratives and engaging interactive experiences. The campaign draws upon the shared commitment of Disney and National Geographic to raise awareness about conservation and environmental preservation.

data.title: SpaceX, led by Elon Musk, files for IPO, potentially one of the largest ever. Event could lead to generational wealth.
data.description: A potential initial public offering from the rocket and satellite company of entrepreneur Elon Musk could become a once-in-a-lifetime opportunity for wealth creation, possibly ranking as one of the biggest IPOs in history.

data.title: XP Inc. Hosts "Expert Trader XP" Featuring Tom Hougaard and Ralph Acampora
data.description: In São Paulo on April 1, 2026, XP Inc. (Nasdaq: XP), a prominent financial services platform driven by technology, shared important findings from its first "Expert Trader XP" gathering. The event featured renowned experts in trading and market analysis, attracting attention from around the world.

data.title: HOPPR™ AI Foundry Achieves HITRUST e1 Certification, Demonstrating Commitment to Cybersecurity and Information Protection
data.description: HOPPR's platform has received certification confirming its adherence to stringent cybersecurity and data protection criteria, following a thorough independent evaluation. This builds on the company's achievement of a SOC 2 Type II attestation. The certification signifies HOPPR's commitment to maintaining high standards in cybersecurity. The validation was granted in Chicago on April 1, 2026.

data.title: GLENSTAR RECEIVES APPROVAL FOR EXTENSIVE DRILL PROGRAM AT WILDHORSE TUNGSTEN-COPPER-POLYMETALLIC PROJECT IN NEVADA
data.description: Glenstar Minerals Inc. has revealed plans for a 13-hole drill operation at two exploration locations. Additionally, they will be constructing 2,200 feet of new road as part of the project. The company has secured a contract with a driller for this endeavor. The announcement was made in Vancouver, BC on April 1, 2026. Glenstar Minerals Inc. trades on the CSE under the ticker symbol GSTR, on the OTCQB as GSTRF, and on the FRA as VO20.

data.title: Seligman Ventures Leads Cognichip’s $60M Series A to Back Physics-Informed AI for Chip Design, Intel CEO Lip-Bu Tan and Seligman Ventures’ Umesh Padval Join the Board
data.description: Cognichip, based in Redwood City, California, has introduced ACI® - Artificial Chip Intelligence - for semiconductor design. The company recently secured a significant amount of funding with an oversubscribed $60 million Series A round, led by Seligman Ventures along with contributions from SBI Investment and other semiconductor-focused investors. In addition to the new investors, all initial seed investors such as Mayfield, Lux Capital, FPV, and Candou Ventures, exceeded their pro rata allocations. This latest funding round brings Cognichip's total funding to $93 million.

BoC's Meeting Minutes: The governing council agreed to keep options open BoC Governing Council felt that in the near term, risks to growth looked tilted towards the downside, whereas the oil price shock represented additional upside risk to inflation.
